title: aidriven-resources manifest
description: Schema for manifest.json at the root of the aidriven-resources repository (FR-019, FR-022, FR-022a).

schemaVersion.description: Manifest schema version. Bumped on breaking changes; CLI versions older than the schema MUST refuse to parse.

generatedAt.description: Optional ISO-8601 timestamp; not consumed by the CLI.

artifacts.description: Artifacts grouped by type. v1 supports only the 'skill' key.

skill.description: Map of skill name → entry. Keys MUST match the artifact-name regex.

pathInRepo.description: Relative path within aidriven-resources to the skill directory (e.g. 'skills/code-reviewer'). Forward slashes only. MUST NOT contain '..' segments.

archiveSha256.description: Hex SHA-256 of the full repository tarball at the resolved commit SHA. The CLI verifies the downloaded tarball against this value (FR-024).

compatibleTargets.description: AI targets the skill officially supports (FR-021). Targets outside this list trigger an incompatibility warning.

description.description: Short human-readable summary, shown in CLI output.
